## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX and Prophecy article publishing workflow and content planning](https://fathom.video/share/dQHEy58-bij-CbJHS_X4wUUnMSDjyxDe?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Established process for image creation and placement in articles](https://fathom.video/share/dQHEy58-bij-CbJHS_X4wUUnMSDjyxDe?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
  - [Added new fields to Airtable for tracking article details (location, author, publish date, category)](https://fathom.video/share/dQHEy58-bij-CbJHS_X4wUUnMSDjyxDe?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [Identified ETL article as next to publish this week](https://fathom.video/share/dQHEy58-bij-CbJHS_X4wUUnMSDjyxDe?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
  - [Discussed upcoming product launches and potential for teaser content](https://fathom.video/share/dQHEy58-bij-CbJHS_X4wUUnMSDjyxDe?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)
  - [Agreed to create content assets from recent webinar](https://fathom.video/share/dQHEy58-bij-CbJHS_X4wUUnMSDjyxDe?tab=summary&timestamp=1801.0)

## Topics

### Image Creation Process

  - [Prophecy team to provide images, including feature thumbnails and in-article images](https://fathom.video/share/dQHEy58-bij-CbJHS_X4wUUnMSDjyxDe?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
  - [GrowthX to indicate image placement and basic description in Google Doc drafts](https://fathom.video/share/dQHEy58-bij-CbJHS_X4wUUnMSDjyxDe?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [Considering building a "bench" of reusable images for common themes](https://fathom.video/share/dQHEy58-bij-CbJHS_X4wUUnMSDjyxDe?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Exploring AI-generated image options that align with brand guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/dQHEy58-bij-CbJHS_X4wUUnMSDjyxDe?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)

### Airtable Workflow Updates

  - [Added new fields:](https://fathom.video/share/dQHEy58-bij-CbJHS_X4wUUnMSDjyxDe?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
      - [Where article will be published (main index vs blog)](https://fathom.video/share/dQHEy58-bij-CbJHS_X4wUUnMSDjyxDe?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
      - [Byline author](https://fathom.video/share/dQHEy58-bij-CbJHS_X4wUUnMSDjyxDe?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)
      - [Proposed publish date/week](https://fathom.video/share/dQHEy58-bij-CbJHS_X4wUUnMSDjyxDe?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)
      - [Blog category](https://fathom.video/share/dQHEy58-bij-CbJHS_X4wUUnMSDjyxDe?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)
  - [These fields will help streamline editorial review process](https://fathom.video/share/dQHEy58-bij-CbJHS_X4wUUnMSDjyxDe?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)

### Content Planning

  - [Identified ETL article "ETL explained for basic concepts" as next to publish](https://fathom.video/share/dQHEy58-bij-CbJHS_X4wUUnMSDjyxDe?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
  - [Discussed concerns about code snippets in articles, may need product team review](https://fathom.video/share/dQHEy58-bij-CbJHS_X4wUUnMSDjyxDe?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [GrowthX to propose 3 article topics every two weeks for team review](https://fathom.video/share/dQHEy58-bij-CbJHS_X4wUUnMSDjyxDe?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)
  - [Exploring content opportunities around upcoming survey results (Feb 19) and product launch (Feb 27)](https://fathom.video/share/dQHEy58-bij-CbJHS_X4wUUnMSDjyxDe?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)

### Webinar Content Creation

  - [Plan to create two assets from recent webinar:](https://fathom.video/share/dQHEy58-bij-CbJHS_X4wUUnMSDjyxDe?tab=summary&timestamp=1801.0)
    1.  Article focusing on one speaker's insights
    2.  eBook for lead capture and nurture campaigns
  - [Ashleigh to send webinar recording file for transcription and content creation](https://fathom.video/share/dQHEy58-bij-CbJHS_X4wUUnMSDjyxDe?tab=summary&timestamp=1817.0)

### Editorial Process Refinement

  - [Discussed adding pre and post-webinar blog content to standard process](https://fathom.video/share/dQHEy58-bij-CbJHS_X4wUUnMSDjyxDe?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Will use current webinar content as a test case for this approach](https://fathom.video/share/dQHEy58-bij-CbJHS_X4wUUnMSDjyxDe?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
